recent: Instead of waiting for motivation, we should rely on discipline.	与其等待动力，不如依靠自律。
Short but focused review can still produce meaningful progress.	短而专注的复习也能带来有意义的进步。
把任务拆成更小的步骤，会让日常坚持变得更容易。	Breaking a task into smaller steps makes daily persistence easier.
Progress becomes stable when practice is regular.	练习规律时，进步才会稳定。
because	since；as；due to the fact that。
